name: Doctorglasses Chain Co.,Ltd
summary: Doctorglasses Chain Co., Ltd engages in retail of eyewear in China. The company offers glasses under the President optical, Dr. glasses z√É¬®le, and artificial stone brand names. It operates 318 chain stores, including 304 direct stores and 14 franchised stores. The company was founded in 1993 and is headquartered in Shenzhen, China.
